---
title: The role of subtropical irreversible PV mixing in the zonal mean circulation
  response to global warming-like thermal forcing
pagetitle: 2013-12-1-Lu2013 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2013
author: Jian Lu, Lantao Sun, Yutian Wu and Gang Chen
venue: Journal of Climate
venue_cit: <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 27, 2297--2316, doi:10.1175/JCLI-D-13-00372.1.
recommended_citation: 'Jian Lu, Lantao Sun, Yutian Wu and Gang Chen, 2013: The role
  of subtropical irreversible PV mixing in the zonal mean circulation response to
  global warming-like thermal forcing, <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 27, 2297--2316,
  doi:10.1175/JCLI-D-13-00372.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JCLI-D-13-00372.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The role of subtropical irreversible PV mixing in the zonal mean circulation response to global warming-like thermal forcing

*Published in Journal of Climate, 2013*

**Recommended citation:** Jian Lu, Lantao Sun, Yutian Wu and Gang Chen, 2013: The role of subtropical irreversible PV mixing in the zonal mean circulation response to global warming-like thermal forcing, <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 27, 2297--2316, doi:10.1175/JCLI-D-13-00372.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JCLI-D-13-00372.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
